pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok dependency version to a newer release.
Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
